# Business / Legal Agents

The "corporate team" half of Engineering Studio AI's pitch — produces the
non-engineering artifacts a real org would also ship: cost estimate and
compliance/legal notes. Condensed from
`prompts/agents/mdap/domain-specialists-industry/disciplines/`.

| File | Role |
| :--- | :--- |
| `cost-business-specialist.agent.md` | BOM-to-cost rollup, business viability notes |
| `legal-compliance-specialist.agent.md` | Applicable compliance/regulatory flags (e.g. safety standards, export/ITAR-adjacent notes) |

| Version | Date       | Author     | Description        |
